2603.14276.title: All-day Multi-scenes Lifelong Vision-and-Language Navigation with Tucker Adaptation
2603.14276.paper_summary: Deploying vision-and-language navigation (VLN) agents requires adaptation across diverse scenes and environments, but fine-tuning on a specific scenario often causes catastrophic forgetting in others, which severely limits flexible long-term deployment. We formalize this challenge as the all-day multi-scenes lifelong VLN (AML-VLN) problem. Existing parameter-efficient adapters (e.g., LoRA and its variants) are limited by their two-dimensional matrix form, which fails to capture the multi-hierarchical navigation knowledge spanning multiple scenes and environments. To address this, we propose Tucker Adaptation (TuKA), which represents the multi-hierarchical navigation knowledge as a high-order tensor and leverages Tucker decomposition to decouple the knowledge into shared subspaces and scenario-specific experts. We further introduce a decoupled knowledge incremental learning strategy to consolidate shared subspaces while constraining specific experts for decoupled lifelong learning. Building on TuKA, we also develop a VLN agent named AlldayWalker, which continually learns across multiple navigation scenarios, achieving all-day multi-scenes navigation. Extensive experiments show that AlldayWalker consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines.
2603.14276.paper_summary_zh: 部署視覺與語言導航（VLN）代理需要在多樣的場景和環境中進行適應，但在特定場景上的微調往往會導致其他場景的災難性遺忘，這嚴重限制了靈活的長期部署。我們將這一挑戰形式化為全天候多場景終身VLN（AML-VLN）問題。現有的參數高效適配器（例如，LoRA及其變體）受到其二維矩陣形式的限制，無法捕捉跨越多個場景和環境的多層次導航知識。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了Tucker適應（TuKA），它將多層次導航知識表示為高階張量，並利用Tucker分解將知識解耦為共享子空間和特定場景的專家。我們進一步引入了一種解耦知識增量學習策略，以鞏固共享子空間，同時限制特定專家以實現解耦的終身學習。在TuKA的基礎上，我們還開發了一個名為AlldayWalker的VLN代理，該代理在多個導航場景中持續學習，實現全天候多場景導航。大量實驗表明，AlldayWalker始終優於最先進的基準。
2603.14276.author: Xudong Wang et.al.
2603.14276.authors: Xudong Wang, Gan Li, Zhiyu Liu, Yao Wang, Lianqing Liu, Zhi Han
